hard_gates.name: synthetic-approved-evidence-only
hard_gates.evidence: No private course or student data was used.

hard_gates.name: policy-short-circuit
hard_gates.evidence: All seven required cases stopped before Ollama.

hard_gates.name: prospective-quality-rubric
hard_gates.evidence: The 15/18 support audit was defined after output inspection and has one reviewer.

decision.rationale: Local Gemma 3 4B passed structural transport, policy, and citation-relationship checks but failed three of 18 diagnostic sentence-support reviews. The quality rubric was post-run and cannot select a model or prompt.
limitations: The evaluation used one small synthetic corpus and an easy evidence set.
The factual-support rubric was defined after the run and reviewed once.
No prompt variant, repeated trial, tail latency, cold start, or fit-for-purpose comparison model was evaluated.
The harder retrieval evidence-sufficiency boundary remains unresolved.
